*The young merchant and his bodyguard set forth towards the clear blue sea.*
*The young merchant and his bodyguard reached a green expanse, the gentle breeze carrying sweet scents through the air.*
*The young merchant and his bodyguard set forth into the deep valley, which may hold even deeper secrets.*
*At the end of the path weaved by the sea-maid was a sight most astounding.*
*From the lamp before them emerged a grinning genie.*
*They emerged from the dark cave and were greeted by the glittering sea.*
*In the bowels of the cove, the end of their journey was marked by an unexpected encounter.*
*Though it called ruin upon its foes, the monstrous fish was felled.*
*At last, the merchant and his bodyguard set foot inside the palace, its ornate entrance hinting at bygone resplendence.*
*Gems were piled about the palace chambers, filling the space with glittering light.*
*Yet the treasure seekers believed that even greater riches awaited in the palace's depths.*
*Standing in their path was a monstrous bird with an appetite for flesh.*
*From the lamp before them emerged a grinning genie.*
*Standing in their path was a monstrous bird with an appetite for flesh.*
*Though the bird was laid low, the path ahead was treacherous still.*
*In the valley's most remote reaches they faced their deadliest challenge yet.*

*With the foremost bodyguard of Corvos by his side, the young merchant set out on his journey.*
*Among the many paths before him, the merchant chose the backstreet, lined with homes.*
*Among the many paths before him, the merchant felt drawn to the lively shouts of the bazaar.*
*Among the many paths before him, the merchant approached the grand gates.*
